data.title: Goldman Sachs Revises U.S. Recession Forecast Following Presidential Announcement
data.description: According to Odaily, Goldman Sachs initially released a report predicting a 65% chance of a U.S. recession within the next 12 months. However, shortly after U.S. President Donald Trump announced a pause in certain statements, Goldman Sachs quickly retracted this forecast.

data.title: Goldman Sachs quickly scraps U.S. recession forecast
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Goldman Sachs released a recession forecast report, predicting that the probability of a recession in the United States in the next 12 months is 65%. But about an hour later (after Trump announced the suspension statement), Goldman Sachs quickly scrapped this forecast. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analyst: Trump's wording is vague, tariff uncertainty remains high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: John Canavan, chief analyst at Oxford Economics in New York: From the way President Trump worded it, we are not entirely clear whether it is really suspended (tariffs) or just reducing the reciprocal tariffs to 10%. But in any case, it is clear that Trump has given up some of the worst tariff threats here, and I think this is obviously a sustainable net positive for risky assets. One thing it did not do is eliminate uncertainty, which is because the tariff level seems to change every day. (Jinshi)

data.title: SOL breaks through 120 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 13.57%
data.description: OKX market shows that SOL has broken through 120 USDT and is now at 120.11 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 13.57%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Magic Eden acquires decentralized exchange Slingshot
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, NFT platform Magic Eden announced the acquisition of decentralized trading platform Slingshot. Through this acquisition, Magic Eden will provide users with a seamless, bridge-free on-chain token trading experience.

data.title: Strategist warns: Nasdaq's 8% rise in 20 minutes is not much healthier than an 8% fall
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Mark Hackett, chief market strategist at Philadelphia National Investment Management Group: Trump's suspension of tariffs is definitely good news because it shows that the negotiations are in a good enough state and they believe that they have accomplished what they need to accomplish through the initial dialogue. But I want to make a very important warning, because the Nasdaq index rising 8% in 20 minutes is not much healthier than falling 8%... So I am very careful now and can't give you a security alert. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analysis: If BTC holds the $80,700 support level, it may rise to $84,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst Ali Yu X wrote that if BTC holds the support level of $80,700, it may rise to $84,000 or even $87,000.

data.title: Fed minutes: Inflation could rise this year due to tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - The minutes of the Federal Reserve meeting showed that regarding the inflation outlook, participants judged that inflation may rise this year due to higher tariffs, although there is great uncertainty about the magnitude and persistence of the impact. Several participants pointed out that the continued balance in the labor market suggests that labor market conditions are unlikely to be a source of inflationary pressure. Several participants pointed out that in the coming period, it may be particularly difficult to distinguish between relatively persistent changes in inflation and more short-term changes that may be related to the introduction of tariffs. (Jinshi)

data.title: The U.S. stock market's "Big Seven" continued to soar, with Tesla up nearly 18%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that the "Big Seven" in the U.S. stock market continued to soar, with Tesla (TSLA.O) up nearly 18%, Nvidia (NVDA.O) up more than 15%, Meta Platforms (META.O) up nearly 12%, Amazon (AMZN.O) and Apple (AAPL.O) up nearly 10%, Microsoft (MSFT.O) up more than 8%, and Alphabet (GOOG.O) up nearly 8%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Faces Economic Challenges Amid Inflation and Growth Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve policymakers nearly unanimously agreed at last month's meeting that the U.S. economy is facing the simultaneous risks of rising inflation and slowing growth. Some policymakers noted that the Fed might face 'difficult trade-offs.' The meeting, held on March 18-19, followed the initial tariff plans by the Trump administration, which increased uncertainty about the economic outlook and led participants to lean towards a 'cautious approach.' If inflation persists, options include maintaining higher interest rates for an extended period, or if a weak economy requires more direct attention, considering rate cuts. Participants assessed that economic uncertainty has increased, with almost all attendees believing that inflation risks tend to be upward, while employment risks tend to be downward.
